name: conductor
description: An installable AI workflow plugin that routes tasks through focused specialist skills. See SKILL_INDEX.md and ROUTING_MAP.md for detailed routing behavior.
safety_note: The dagger skill and resilience-check command execute destructive, negative, fuzz, adversarial QA, and failure-mode testing. They require explicit user approval, non-production scope, and a passing scripts/dagger_guardrail.py validation before execution. WARNING: Phase 2 allows simulation only and blocks live destructive execution. Do not proceed in a production environment.

skills.primary_use: Business alignment validation, scope validation, requirements traceability, SDLC documentation completeness, acceptance criteria review
skills.description: Business alignment and scope governance authority. See docs/governance/GOVERNANCE_LAYER.md for governance behavior.
skills.avoid_when: Legal, regulatory, privacy, licensing, or IP compliance review is needed (route to the-governor)
skills.role: Business Alignment and Scope Governance Authority
skills.name: the-steward

skills.primary_use: Legal compliance validation, privacy risk review, IP and copyright review, open-source license compatibility, Terms of Service and Privacy Policy impact, audit documentation, security governance
skills.description: Legal, regulatory, privacy, IP, and compliance governance authority. Does not provide legal advice. Sits above Conductor. See docs/governance/GOVERNANCE_LAYER.md.
skills.avoid_when: Business alignment, scope, requirements, or SDLC review is needed (route to the-steward)
skills.role: Legal, Compliance, Privacy, and IP Governance Authority
skills.name: the-governor

skills.primary_use: Continuity review, validation-state review, branch and merge readiness, source-of-truth checks, handoff readiness, access/visibility closeout
skills.description: Workflow continuity, validation, and transition governance specialist. See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Designing architecture, implementing features, writing documentation content, or replacing normal QA ownership
skills.role: Workflow Continuity, Validation, and Transition Governance Specialist
skills.name: arbiter

skills.primary_use: QA strategy, test planning, validation gates, release readiness, CI/CD validation, persona validation
skills.description: QA, Test Strategy, Validation, CI, and Release Readiness Specialist. See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Implementing test code, architecture design, security policy, or long documentation
skills.role: QA, Test Strategy, Validation, CI, and Release Readiness Specialist
skills.name: overseer

skills.primary_use: Project orientation, multi-skill routing, workflow planning, access/visibility routing
skills.description: Routing and orchestration layer. Chooses the smallest effective skill stack. See ROUTING_MAP.md and SKILL_INDEX.md for detailed routing behavior.
skills.name: conductor

skills.primary_use: Security policy, RBAC, authorization, authentication risk, privacy, secrets, visibility/access-control
skills.description: Security, Privacy, Access Control, and Threat Review Specialist. Do not use for offensive or destructive testing. See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Offensive testing is needed, or for implementation, database design, or application architecture
skills.role: Security, Privacy, Access Control, and Threat Review Specialist
skills.name: cipher

skills.primary_use: UI, UX, accessibility, visual hierarchy, responsive layout, interaction design
skills.description: UI/UX, Accessibility, Responsive Layout, and Frontend Design Specialist. See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Frontend implementation code, backend logic, security policy, or architecture diagrams
skills.role: UI/UX, Accessibility, Responsive Layout, and Frontend Design Specialist
skills.name: cloak

skills.primary_use: Chaos scenarios, resilience weaknesses, failure-paths, negative tests, guardrail gaps
skills.description: Chaos and resilience specialist. Generates controlled failure paths. Operates strictly within safety boundaries and never executes unauthorized, destructive, or production-impacting tests. See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Code implementation, QA test planning, CI validation, security policy, database design
skills.role: Chaos, Resilience, and Adversarial Scenario Specialist
skills.name: dagger

skills.primary_use: SQL schemas, NoSQL documents, JSON, ORM, migrations, constraints, indexes, normalization
skills.description: Data Persistence and Database Management Specialist. See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Evaluating visible UI, testing plans, business workflows, architecture boundaries, or security policy
skills.role: Data Persistence and Database Management Specialist
skills.name: chronicler

skills.primary_use: Visual modeling, UML, ERD, architecture, workflow, data-flow diagrams via Mermaid/PlantUML
skills.description: Visual Modeling and Diagram Generation Specialist. See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Database design decisions, documentation prose, code implementation, security policy
skills.role: Visual Modeling and Diagram Generation Specialist
skills.name: weaver

skills.primary_use: Documentation prose, READMEs, setup guides, release notes, SDLC, technical summaries
skills.description: Documentation and Knowledge Transfer Specialist. See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Architecture decisions, database design, normalization analysis, UI design, diagram generation, or code implementation
skills.name: scribe

skills.primary_use: OOP architecture, layered architecture, system design, refactoring
skills.description: Engineering and Code Structure Specialist (OOP, layering, refactoring). See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Modifying UI layouts, testing security boundaries, or writing documentation
skills.name: clockwork

skills.description: Implementation and Navigation Specialist. Owns minimal safe edits. See SKILL_INDEX.md.
skills.avoid_when: Architecture design, UI/UX decisions, security policies
skills.name: ponytail
